response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and cross-platform experience aligned with the role’s tech stack, but lacks explicit leadership experience in IT consulting, UML architecture modeling, and German language proficiency (only basic), which are critical for client advisory and team leadership in this senior role.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact in GIS and tooling
Proven full-stack expertise across Linux, Python-adjacent (Node.js), and high-performance systems
Strong track record in mentoring, workshops, and dev-ops infrastructure setup
concerns: German proficiency listed as 'Basic' — fails C1 requirement for client advisory
No explicit evidence of UML modeling, IT architecture design, or requirements management in consulting context
Lacks demonstrated experience leading teams in an IT consulting firm or managing client project portfolios
